utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am quitting ! ! Woo ... hoo ! I am okay ! ! I am all right ! !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wow ! That is exciting , you went to Japan , made up a woman .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am just saying , this woman , I mean she is fictitious . No ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Cause you are still into Monica .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So you told her there was somebody else so she would agree to work with you , so cause you figure oh if you spent a lot of time together , maybe something might happen , and ...

utterances.text: You are good . You are good !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , no , I am fairly intuitive and psychic . It is a substantial gift .
